search.query: `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:api:alerts" alert_id=* | dedup alert_id | stats values(deviceIds{}) as Device_id by alert_id, severity | stats count by Device_id, alert_id , severity | join Device_id [| search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" | dedup id | table id, site.location,type | rename id as Device_id, site.location as device_location, type as device_type] | search device_location="$site$" | stats values(*) as * by alert_id

`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:api:alerts" | dedup alert_id | stats values(deviceIds{}) as Device_id by alert_id | stats count by Device_id, alert_id | join Device_id [| search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" | dedup id | table id, site.location | rename id as Device_id, site.location as device_location] | dedup device_location | table device_location

`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:api:alerts" alert_id=* | dedup alert_id | stats values(deviceIds{}) as Device_id by alert_id | stats count by Device_id, alert_id | join Device_id [| search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" | dedup id | table id, site.location | rename id as Device_id, site.location as device_location] | search device_location="$site$" | stats values(*) as * by alert_id | stats count

`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:api:alerts" alert_id=* |dedup alert_id | stats values(deviceIds{}) as Device_id by alert_id, alert_title | stats count by Device_id, alert_id, alert_title | join Device_id [| search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" | dedup id | table id, site.location | rename id as Device_id, site.location as device_location] | search device_location="$site$" | stats values(*) as * by alert_id | top alert_title useother=true

condition.link: search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:api:alerts" alert_id=* | dedup alert_id | stats values(deviceIds{}) as Device_id values(*) as * by alert_id, alert_title , _time | stats count values(*) as * by Device_id, alert_id, alert_title, _time | join Device_id [| search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" | dedup id | table id, site.location | rename id as Device_id, site.location as device_location] | search device_location="$site$" | stats values(*) as * by _time alert_id | search NOT [ search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:api:alerts" alert_id=* | dedup alert_id | stats values(deviceIds{}) as Device_id values(*) as * by alert_id, alert_title , _time | stats count values(*) as * by Device_id, alert_id, alert_title, _time | join Device_id [| search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" | dedup id | table id, site.location | rename id as Device_id, site.location as device_location] | search device_location="$site$" | stats values(*) as * by _time alert_id | top alert_title useother=true showcount=false showperc=false | format]&earliest=$field1.earliest$&latest=$field1.latest$

search?q=`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:api:alerts" alert_id=* | dedup alert_id | stats values(deviceIds{}) as Device_id, values(*) as * by alert_id, alert_title , _time | stats count values(*) as * by Device_id, alert_id, alert_title, _time | join Device_id [| search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" | dedup id | table id, site.location | rename id as Device_id, site.location as device_location] | search device_location="$site$" | stats values(*) as * by _time alert_id | search alert_title="$click.value$"&earliest=$field1.earliest$&latest=$field1.latest$

search.query: `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:api:alerts" alert_id=* | dedup alert_id | stats values(deviceIds{}) as Device_id by alert_id,severity, _time | stats count by Device_id, alert_id, severity, _time | join Device_id [| search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" | dedup id | table id, site.location | rename id as Device_id, site.location as device_location] | search device_location="$site$" | stats values(*) as * by alert_id, _time | eval severity=if(severity="high","1.high",if(severity="medium","2.medium","3.low")) | timechart count by severity | rename 1.* as * | rename 2.* as * | rename 3.* as *

stats count(eval(severity="low")) as low count(eval(severity="medium")) as medium count(eval(severity="high")) as high count as total by device_type | rename device_type as "Site" | sort $device_type$ -total | fields - total

stats count(eval(severity="low")) as low count(eval(severity="medium")) as medium count(eval(severity="high")) as high count as total by device_location | rename device_location as "Site" | sort $device_location$ -total | fields - total

`get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:api:alerts" alert_id=* | dedup alert_id | stats values(deviceIds{}) as Device_id by alert_id,_time,severity, status, alert_title,title | stats count, values(_time) as _time, values(severity) as severity, values(status) as status, values(alert_title) as alert_title, values(title) as title by Device_id, alert_id | join Device_id [| search `get_armis_index` sourcetype="armis:device" | dedup id | table id, site.location , name | rename id as Device_id, site.location as device_location, name as dvc] | search device_location="$site$" | stats values(*) as * by alert_id,_time,severity, status, alert_title,title | rename device_location as site | eval "Latest Related Activity"=mvindex('title',0) | table _time severity alert_title "Latest Related Activity" status site alert_id dvc | rename alert_title as "Alert Title" site as "Sites Impacted" severity as "Severity" status as "Status" dvc as "Devices Impacted"
